message:
🌱 Add opentofu: Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block mission (#829)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-1033-add-support-for-for-each-in-the-import-block",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block",
+    "description": "Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block. Requested by 34+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentofu deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentofu version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nhelm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentofu installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentofu configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu\n```\n### OpenTofu Version\n\n```shell\n1.6.0-dev\n```\n\n### Use Cases\n\nThe `import` block could benefit greatly from supporting `for_each`. \n\nCurrently, importing resources that are using `for_each` is not possible / hard using the `import` block for them."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block",
+        "description": "Related to https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1033\n\nCurrent plan for implementing `for_each` for the `import` block:\n1. Prepare `ImportTarget` types and codebase for more dynamic addresses (addresses that are not fully known from the get-go) **<--- You are here**\n2. Allow for having a more\n```yaml\nimport {\n  for_each = local.bucket_ids\n  id = each.value.id\n  to = aws_s3_bucket.bucket[each.value.key]\n}\n\nresource \"aws_s3_bucket\" \"bucket\" {\n  for_each = local.bucket_ids\n  ...\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Related to https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1033\n\nCurrent plan for implementing `for_each` for the `import` block:\n1. Prepare `ImportTarget` types and codebase for more dynamic addresses (addresses that are not fully known from the get-go) **<--- You are here**\n2. Allow for having a more dynamic address in the `to` field of an `import` block\n3.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "import {\n  for_each = local.bucket_ids\n  id = each.value.id\n  to = aws_s3_bucket.bucket[each.value.key]\n}\n\nresource \"aws_s3_bucket\" \"bucket\" {\n  for_each = local.bucket_ids\n  ...\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "opentofu"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
